description: Project-specific testing boundaries, environments, and mock strategies. All AI agents must enforce these rules when writing or fixing tests.

coverage_baseline.critical_paths: 90%+ for Storage, Migration, and Highlighting algorithms.
coverage_baseline.general: >= 50% for all new code before PR submission.

fixture_strategy.rule: ALWAYS reference external test fixtures (HTML snippets, large JSON payloads) from tests/fixtures/ instead of hardcoding large payloads in test files.
fixture_strategy.notion_api: Use `.agents/.shared/references/notion_api/` for Notion block structures and database properties.

chrome_api_mocking.rule: Do not mutate window.chrome directly. Override global.chrome.
chrome_api_mocking.setup: Declare mock variables and spies at the top level and initialize them in beforeEach.
chrome_api_mocking.teardown: You MUST execute jest.clearAllMocks() and clean up global.chrome in afterEach to prevent test pollution.

gold_standard_references.notion_api_validation: tests/unit/background/notion-page-operations.test.js (示範如何深度驗證 payload 及 fetch Mocking)
gold_standard_references.chrome_message_handlers: tests/unit/background/handlers/saveHandlers.test.js, tests/unit/background/handlers/highlightHandlers.test.js, tests/unit/background/handlers/MessageHandler.test.js (示範如何使用真實入口驗證訊息流與 storage 狀態)

anti_patterns.ban_shallow_assertions: Do NOT just test if fetch or sendMessage was called. You MUST assert the exact expected payload object structure.
anti_patterns.ban_overmocking: Do NOT mock internal dependencies of the file under test unless it inherently involves Network/Storage I/O. Follow authentic AAA patterns.
anti_patterns.ban_phantom_tests: Do NOT define custom simulate functions inside the test file that bypass real product code. For historical phantom tests (e.g. ones using XXXSimulated), prioritize migrating them into true handler/service tests or deleting them.

e2e_testing.rationale: To verify Content Script impact on DOM and bypass difficult message timing issues, we inject directly into the Service Worker context.

implementation_rule.do: Reference `tests/e2e/specs/highlight.spec.js` and use `serviceWorker.evaluate` for direct injection testing.
implementation_rule.do_not: Do NOT use direct injection if testing Background Worker message routing logic. Instead, mock `chrome.runtime.sendMessage`.

test_execution_tags.instruction: Use these strings with `npm run test:e2e -- --grep="<string>"` instead of running wrapper scripts.

linting_overrides.rule: Follow the project's ESLint configuration. Do not emit DeepSource (skipcq) comments.
